globalNews.title: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
globalNews.summary: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.

globalNews.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
globalNews.summary: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

globalNews.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
globalNews.summary: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

globalNews.title: Armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
globalNews.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

globalNews.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
globalNews.summary: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum Foundation unstakes 17K ETH after nearing 70K staked ETH milestone
cryptoNews.summary: The Ethereum Foundation unstaked over 17,000 ETH worth $40M shortly after approaching its 70,000 ETH staking target.

cryptoNews.title: Trump’s official memecoin extends slide as he hosts exclusive investor gala
cryptoNews.summary: TRUMP memecoin fell nearly 10% in 24 hours despite a Mar-a-Lago investor gala, with the token still down over 96% from its peak.

cryptoNews.title: US DOJ sentences man to 70 months in prison for role in $263M scam group
cryptoNews.summary: The group spent tens of millions of dollars on luxury items and real estate, using funds stolen from crypto users in social engineering scams.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoiners cast doubt on the US military's understanding of the network
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin advocate Matthew Kratter said US Navy Admiral Samuel Paparo's Senate testimony on Tuesday sounded like it was written by an "intern."

cryptoNews.title: CFTC sues New York over bid to apply gambling laws to prediction markets
cryptoNews.summary: The CFTC has filed suit to block New York from enforcing gambling laws on prediction platforms, arguing federal regulators have sole authority over event-based contracts.

aiNews.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
aiNews.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

aiNews.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
aiNews.summary: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.

aiNews.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
aiNews.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

aiNews.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
